title: Debt Knight
pitch: Borrow raw power from a demon bank — interest compounds live, and collector demons materialize sized to what you owe.
howto: Take a loan before each sortie and split it across damage, speed and vitality. Slay imps for gold, pay the principal mid-fight to shrink the collectors, and settle before the timer. Bank leftover gold for permanent training, and build credit for better rates and bigger loans.
controls: Hold or drag anywhere to move — the knight attacks by himself. Tap PAY to service the debt, HEAL to spend gold on your hide.
